work_unit: SZ-SP-L-004: History list renders all items without virtualization
situation: HistoryTab.tsx uses history.map() to render entire list in DOM with no viewport constraint or lazy loading. In sidepanel (~400px wide), large history causes excessive DOM nodes, layout jank, and memory pressure from base64 thumbnail decoding.
action: Added max-h-[calc(100vh-140px)] overflow-y-auto to list container for native browser scrolling (no JS virtualizer needed for extension sidepanel scale). Added loading='lazy' to img tags to defer off-screen thumbnail decoding.
outcome_evidence: Commit 56d01ed on auto/opt-sidepanel-1782907225 pushed to origin. List container now scrollable; images lazy-loaded. Direct-edit path per case-104 escape hatch (cp-guard triggered due to prior unmerged fixes on same file).
next_suggestion: Next pending: SZ-SP-L-005 (Tab buttons lack ARIA attributes) or SZ-PP-L-002 (testVisionConnection no timeout)
